ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Stikker for Debra Dolch (Administrator). Edward Koplowitz for Steve Anderson (Beneficiary).

Mr. Koplowitz had nothing further to add. Mr. Stikker explained the extent of services provided, circumstances and time spent to support fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Steven Anderson.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Continued To Feb-05-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francisco Silva for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Silva requested an extension of time until February stating that the ancillary probate in Nevada just closed. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution was continued to February 5, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-18-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (601 Peninsula Drive)
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francisco Silva for Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $280,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed September 3, 2013. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Anne Bouliane. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (600 Deep Forest Rd. Lake Almador)
Off Calendar Nov-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francisco Silva for and with Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $135,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (600 Deep Forest Road, Lake Almanor, Ca 96137)
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Preliminary Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randolph Wallace for Mary Hamilton and Connie Samarzes (Petitioners). Steven Duditch for Pamela Maillard and Gloria Maillard. Edward Koplowitz for Steve Anderson. Thomas Stikker for Debra Dolch (Administrator/Petitioner).

All Counsel agree to Noel Samarzes receiving interest, to the form of payment of the $100,000.00 lump sum distribution and to deleting the word "jointly" from the order. The Court granted the Petition for Preliminary Distribution of Estate (subject to review of the revised order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Continued To Apr-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Will Contest Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for and with Steve Anderson (Respondent). Randolph Wallace for Mary Hamilton and Connie Samarzes (Petitioners). Steven Duditch for Pamela Maillard and Gloria Maillard (Petitioners).

The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Will Contest Settlement Agreement (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguer/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (264 Dalewood Way, San Francisco, Ca 94116)
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Stikker for and with Debra Dolch.

Court confirmation is for 50% interest of the Estate. 100% of the property sold for $712,000.00. The sale was confirmed based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $339,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

Petition For Full Authority To Administer Estate Under Independent Administration Of Estates Act (Probate Code Sec 10450)
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Will Under Common Law, Statutory Law And California Probate Code Section 21350, And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz for Steve Anderson. Randall Wallace for Mary Hamilton. Steven Duditch for Pamela Maillard and for Gloria Maillard.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under subnission for the purpose of determining if the matter will be sent out to Department 206 for trial setting.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Lazatin.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tom Stikker for Debra Dolch. Ed Koplowitz for Steven Anderson. Randolph Wallace for Connie Samarezes and Mary Hamilton and specially appearing for Attorney Steven Duditch for Pamela Malliard and Gloria Malliard.

The Court ruled that Debra Dolch is to remain neutral and that it is not her obligation to defend the will.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Will Under Common Law, Statutory Law And California Probate Code Section 21350, And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Continued To Sep-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Will Under Common Law, Statutory Law And California Probate Code Section 21350, And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Aug-02-2011 Continued To Aug-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Advanced From Mar-07-11 To Mar-01-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration (Ex Parte)
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for and with Steven Anderson. Randy Wallace for and with Mary Hamilton.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Ms. Dolch being appointed as Special Administrator versus Steven Anderson being appointed Executor, no filing of a contest, the issue of IAE (Independent Administration of Estate) powers and the issue of bond. Counsel stipulated to the will being admitted to probate, that objections will maintain their viability, and to Debra Dolch being appointed as Special Administrator with general powers and bond set at $1,200,000.00. Upon marshalling of the assets, if it appears that the amount of the bond should be greater Ms. Dolch can file an ex parte application to increase bond. The hearing date on the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary was advanced from March 7th to today and taken off calendar. The Petition for Letters of Special Administration was granted.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Continued To Mar-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Shustoff for and with Steven Anderson (Petitioner). Randy Wallace for and with Mary Hamilton (Objector).

Mr. Shustoff stated that he had not received a copy of the objection, that there was a possibility of some of the Heirs at Law not receiving notice, that there were no joint tenancy accounts, that the bills were not being paid at this point and that he had no objection to a Special Administrator. Mr. Wallace stated that Debra Dolch is willing to serve as Special Administrator. Mr. Shustoff stated that he had no objection to Debra Dolch being appointed and that he would file the petition to appoint Special Administrator. The matter was continued to March 7, 2011 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2011 Continued To Jan-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Hamilton (Niece of Decedent/Objector) in propria persona. Mike Hamilton (Husband of Mary Hamilton/Objector) in propria persona.

The Court stated that this matter was originally pre-granted and that it understood that there was an objection to the petition. Ms. Hamilton confirmed for the Court that she did object to the petition. The Court stated that Ms. Hamilton is to get her written objections on file and that Mr. Hamilton (if he has standing) should also file his objections. The Court continued the matter to January 24, 2011 and advised both of the objectors that if they had any questions as to how to proceed that they should contact an attorney.

Off the record: Mr. Shustoff was notified by the Courtroom Clerk of the new hearing date.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
